The Digital Headquarters for Rental Businesses

The digital headquarters for your rental business.

AT‑LAS — as in, at last. Finally a dashboard with no set rules on how your business runs. Customize the app, the portal and your site to fit you — not the other way around.

Bookings, contracts, payments, a branded customer portal, deep analytics, and the Atlas.io AI assistant — one dashboard you make your own. Cars and trucks, apartments and homes, construction and heavy equipment, tools and gear, event and party rentals, trailers, boats, aircraft — if your company rents it out, you run it on Atlas Rental.io. Solo owner or 300-location operation, it fits.

No charge for 7 days · Set up in minutes · Cancel anytime

Everything, in one place

A complete business, not just a booking form.

Atlas Rental.io replaces the tangle of spreadsheets, calendars, contract PDFs and payment links with one system that runs the whole operation.

Live in minutes

From sign-up to your first booking, fast.

1

Make it yours

Add your logo, brand color and business details. Pick what you rent — the whole app relabels itself for cars, RVs, boats, aircraft or anything you rent.

2

Connect & configure

Guided steps connect payments, email and your website. Set your money rules — rates, deposits, fees, taxes, discounts and payouts — exactly how you run things.

3

Add your assets

Add your assets, invite your team, and share your branded member portal. Atlas.io watches the numbers and tells you what to do next.

Meet Atlas.io

An AI that learns your business and runs beside you.

Atlas.io is built into every Atlas Rental.io dashboard. Tell it what you rent — cars, homes, apartments, yachts, gear, anything — and it scopes and builds the perfect dashboard for you: the right KPIs, labels, booking flow and pricing. Then it keeps working beside you: adjusting settings, answering questions, drafting messages, and flagging what needs attention. Whoever you are, whatever you rent, it fits how you work.

  • "Set my weekend rates 15% higher" — done, across the fleet.
  • Spots idle assets and suggests promotions to fill them.
  • Explains your analytics in plain English, on demand.
Good morning. Utilization dipped to 61% this week — two units sat idle 4+ days. Want me to launch a "3 nights, 15% off" promo for them?
You
Yes, and text the customers from last month.
Promo created and applied to both units. Drafting a text to 42 past renters — want to review it before it sends?
Simple, honest pricing

Plans that scale with you.

Start with a 7-day free trial — no charge for 7 days. Every plan includes the full core — bookings, contracts, the branded portal, analytics and Atlas.io. Step up for more assets, locations, credits and premium features. No per-booking fees, no seat charges.

Good to know

Questions, answered.

Your fleet. Your brand. Your command center.

Set it up in minutes and see your whole operation in one place.
